items.title: Zašto vas boli vrat nakon rada za računalom? Rješenje nije samo: "Ispravite se"
items.summary: OSAM sati za laptopom, još nekoliko na mobitelu i večer pred televizorom. Rezultat? Zatezanje u vratu, bol između lopatica, glavobolja koja kreće iz zatiljka i osjećaj kao da “nosite glavu od 20 kilograma”.

items.title: Jamie Oliver izgubio 12 kg smanjivši unos popularne namirnice
items.summary: SLAVNI kuhar Jamie Oliver otkrio je kako je izgubio 12 kg.

items.title: 'It's not a nice world to bring children into': Births fall to the lowest level in 50 years
items.summary: Live births in England and Wales are at their lowest since 1977, while the age of first-time mothers has also risen.

items.title: Resident doctors in England to strike for 16th time over pay
items.summary: British Medical Association resident doctor members in England announce new strike for four days from 15 June.

items.title: Why are resident doctors striking and how much are they paid?
items.summary: In June, resident doctors in England will walk out for the 16th time in a long-running dispute over pay.

items.title: Tijelo pamti sve: Fizičke posljedice kroničnog stresa s posla
items.summary: KRONIČNI stres na poslu uzrokuje izgaranje koje tiho šteti mozgu, srcu i snu.

items.title: Tijekom vrućina treba biti oprezan zbog jedne nuspojave injekcija za mršavljenje

items.title: New drug could finally stop deadly fatty liver disease
items.summary: Scientists at UC San Diego have unveiled a potentially game-changing treatment for MASH, a severe fatty liver disease affecting millions worldwide. The experimental drug, ION224, blocks a liver enzyme that drives fat buildup and inflammation, two key forces behind liver damage. In clinical trials, p

items.title: Popular anti-aging drug combo caused severe brain damage in mice
items.summary: A drug combo widely explored for anti-aging may actually damage the brain, according to new mouse research showing severe loss of myelin and changes linked to “chemo brain.” Surprisingly, the damaged cells resembled those seen in multiple sclerosis, giving scientists a new lead in understanding—and

items.title: 4 pića koja treba izbjegavati kad ste dehidrirani, prema dijetetičaru
items.summary: IAKO je hidratacija ključna, neka pića mogu imati suprotan učinak.

items.title: New laser heat treatment could stop blindness before it starts
items.summary: A new experimental treatment could finally offer hope for millions of people with dry age-related macular degeneration — one of the leading causes of blindness in older adults. items.title: Imate visok kolesterol? Izbjegavajte ove četiri večernje navike
items.summary: IMATE li povišen kolesterol? Nutricionisti savjetuju izbjegavanje četiri večernje navike.

items.summary: FITNESS eksperiment pratio je početnika koji je 30 dana uzimao kreatin.

items.title: Zašto ste i dalje umorni nakon kave?
items.summary: KAVA mnogima zvuči kao najbrže rješenje za umor, ali kofein nije čarobni prekidač za energiju.

items.title: Scientists say guava juice could make iron supplements work better
items.summary: Researchers found that drinking guava juice may significantly improve anemia by helping the body absorb iron more efficiently. In a review of 17 studies, women and teenage girls who consumed guava juice — especially with iron supplements — experienced noticeable increases in hemoglobin levels. Since

items.title: Namirnice koje ne biste trebali kombinirati s kavom
items.summary: KOMBINIRANJE kave s nekim namirnicama može izazvati probavne smetnje ili smanjiti apsorpciju važnih nutrijenata.

items.title: Četiri dijetetičara se slažu: Jedan sok je najbolje piće za snižavanje visokog tlaka
items.summary: DIJETETIČARI preporučuju sok od cikle kao najbolji napitak za snižavanje visokog krvnog tlaka.

items.title: Scientists are raising new questions about vitamin B12 and cancer
items.summary: Vitamin B12 has long been seen as a health hero, helping the body make red blood cells, repair DNA, and keep nerves functioning properly. items.title: Scientists create supercharged vitamin K that helps the brain heal itself
items.summary: Scientists in Japan have created powerful new vitamin K-based compounds that may help the brain regenerate lost neurons — a breakthrough that could one day change how diseases like Alzheimer’s and Parkinson’s are treated. items.title: Hundreds of children die within months as measles cases soar in Bangladesh
items.summary: The country has recorded more than 60,000 suspected cases of measles in just over two months.
